validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv && python -m uv sync --extra dev --python /usr/bin/python3.12
validated_commands.notes: Use pip install uv (not curl install). Use python -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-10: 11 failed (7 policy_status ANSI + 4 runtime_factory LLM), 7978 passed. All 3 previously-ignored files (test_audit_report, test_deps_update_command, test_plugin_exporter_schema) now pass - removed ignores from test command.

coverage_baseline.notes: 11 pre-existing failures: 7 policy_status ANSI + 4 runtime_factory LLM (no llm package installed). Previously-ignored files now all pass. test_skill_bundle.py YAML failures from 2026-05-08 are now resolved.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file. Core install logic. skip_download logic mocked tests (#552) a good entry point.
compile() helper functions covered (PR #1206). Early-exit paths covered (2026-05-10). Full compilation flow (after line 461) still largely untested - complex, requires filesystem and compiler setup.
18 tests exist in test_deps_update_command.py (previously ignored, now passing). Check what's still uncovered.
8 network-gated integration test files need pytestmark annotations before pytest-discovery swap (#1168 gate 1). Offered to help in comment. Await maintainer confirmation.
7 tests failing: policy_status uses Rich unicode but test expects ASCII. PR #1029 closed by maintainer - do not retry.

completed_work.description: Task3: 13 new tests for compile() command early-exit paths (no apm.yml, --all+--target conflict, --target all deprecation, empty .apm dir, --dry-run bypass, --validate mode). Discovered: 3 previously-ignored test files now pass, test_skill_bundle YAML failures resolved. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task4: PRs #1139, #1206 fully CI-green, no action. Task5: Commented on #1168 and #552. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task4: PRs #1139, #1155 CI-green, no action. Task3: 17 new tests for compile/cli.py helpers. New regression observed: test_skill_bundle YAML failures. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task4: PR #1139 CI-green. Task2: coverage analysis. Task3: 15 new tests for deps/cli.py helpers. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
